'package:flutter/material.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/makeup_profile.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nenum TutorialState {\\\\\\\\n  idle,\\\\\\\\n  initializing,\\\\\\\\n  running,\\\\\\\\n  paused,\\\\\\\\n  completed,\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nenum StepStatus {\\\\\\\\n  notStarted,\\\\\\\\n  active,\\\\\\\\n  completed,\\\\\\\\n  skipped,\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass TutorialController extends ChangeNotifier {\\\\\\\\n  TutorialState _state = TutorialState.idle;\\\\\\\\n  MakeupProfile? _currentProfile;\\\\\\\\n  int _currentStepIndex = 0;\\\\\\\\n  Map\u003cString, StepStatus\u003e _stepStatuses = {};\\\\\\\\n  DateTime? _startTime;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  TutorialState get state =\u003e _state;\\\\\\\\n  MakeupProfile? get currentProfile =\u003e _currentProfile;\\\\\\\\n  int get currentStepIndex =\u003e _currentStepIndex;\\\\\\\\n  int get totalSteps =\u003e _currentProfile?.tutorialSteps.length ?? 0;\\\\\\\\n  bool get isLastStep =\u003e _currentStepIndex \u003e= totalSteps - 1;\\\\\\\\n  TutorialStep? get currentStep {\\\\\\\\n    if (_currentProfile == null || _currentStepIndex \u003e= totalSteps) {\\\\\\\\n      return null;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n    return _currentProfile!.tutorialSteps[_currentStepIndex];\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void startTutorial({MakeupProfile? profile}) {\\\\\\\\n    // Use provided profile or create default for MVP\\\\\\\\n    _currentProfile = profile ?? _getDefaultProfile();\\\\\\\\n    _currentStepIndex = 0;\\\\\\\\n    _state = TutorialState.running;\\\\\\\\n    _startTime = DateTime.now();\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Initialize all steps as not started\\\\\\\\n    _stepStatuses = {\\\\\\\\n      for (var step in _currentProfile!.tutorialSteps)\\\\\\\\n        step.id: StepStatus.notStarted\\\\\\\\n    };\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Mark first step as active\\\\\\\\n    if (_currentProfile!.tutorialSteps.isNotEmpty) {\\\\\\\\n      _stepStatuses[_currentProfile!.tutorialSteps.first.id] = StepStatus.active;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void nextStep() {\\\\\\\\n    if (_currentProfile == null || isLastStep) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Mark current step as completed\\\\\\\\n    final currentStepId = _currentProfile!.tutorialSteps[_currentStepIndex].id;\\\\\\\\n    _stepStatuses[currentStepId] = StepStatus.completed;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Move to next step\\\\\\\\n    _currentStepIndex++;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Mark new step as active\\\\\\\\n    if (_currentStepIndex \u003c totalSteps) {\\\\\\\\n      final nextStepId = _currentProfile!.tutorialSteps[_currentStepIndex].id;\\\\\\\\n      _stepStatuses[nextStepId] = StepStatus.active;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void previousStep() {\\\\\\\\n    if (_currentProfile == null || _currentStepIndex == 0) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Mark current step as not started\\\\\\\\n    final currentStepId = _currentProfile!.tutorialSteps[_currentStepIndex].id;\\\\\\\\n    _stepStatuses[currentStepId] = StepStatus.notStarted;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Move to previous step\\\\\\\\n    _currentStepIndex--;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Mark new step as active\\\\\\\\n    final prevStepId = _currentProfile!.tutorialSteps[_currentStepIndex].id;\\\\\\\\n    _stepStatuses[prevStepId] = StepStatus.active;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void skipStep() {\\\\\\\\n    if (_currentProfile == null || isLastStep) return;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Mark current step as skipped\\\\\\\\n    final currentStepId = _currentProfile!.tutorialSteps[_currentStepIndex].id;\\\\\\\\n    _stepStatuses[currentStepId] = StepStatus.skipped;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    nextStep();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void pauseTutorial() {\\\\\\\\n    _state = TutorialState.paused;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void resumeTutorial() {\\\\\\\\n    _state = TutorialState.running;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void completeTutorial() {\\\\\\\\n    // Mark current step as completed if not already\\\\\\\\n    if (currentStep != null) {\\\\\\\\n      _stepStatuses[currentStep!.id] = StepStatus.completed;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    _state = TutorialState.completed;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void reset() {\\\\\\\\n    _state = TutorialState.idle;\\\\\\\\n    _currentProfile = null;\\\\\\\\n    _currentStepIndex = 0;\\\\\\\\n    _stepStatuses = {};\\\\\\\\n    _startTime = null;\\\\\\\\n    notifyListeners();\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  Duration? get tutorialDuration {\\\\\\\\n    if (_startTime == null) return null;\\\\\\\\n    return DateTime.now().difference(_startTime!);\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  int get completedStepsCount {\\\\\\\\n    return _stepStatuses.values\\\\\\\\n        .where((s) =\u003e s == StepStatus.completed)\\\\\\\\n        .length;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  int get skippedStepsCount {\\\\\\\\n    return _stepStatuses.values.where((s) =\u003e s == StepStatus.skipped).length;\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  MakeupProfile _getDefaultProfile() {\\\\\\\\n    // Default natural makeup tutorial for MVP\\\\\\\\n    return const MakeupProfile(\\\\\\\\n  tutorialSteps: [\\\\\\\\n        TutorialStep(\\\\\\\\n          id: 'step1',\\\\\\\\n          title: 'Apply Lip Color',\\\\\\\\n          instruction: 'Start from the center of your lips and work outward. Use gentle strokes for a natural look.',\\\\\\\\n          targetRegion: TargetRegion.lips,\\\\\\\\n          overlayStyle: OverlayStyle(\\\\\\\\n            color: Color(0xFFE57373),\\\\\\\\n            opacity: 0.4,\\\\\\\\n          ),\\\\\\\\n          order: 1,\\\\\\\\n        ),\\\\\\\\n        TutorialStep(\\\\\\\\n          id: 'step2',\\\\\\\\n          title: 'Add Blush - Left Cheek',\\\\\\\\n          instruction: 'Smile gently and apply blush to the apples of your cheeks. Blend upward toward your temples.',\\\\\\\\n          targetRegion: TargetRegion.leftCheek,\\\\\\\\n          overlayStyle: OverlayStyle(\\\\\\\\n            color: Color(0xFFFFB6C1),\\\\\\\\n            opacity: 0.3,\\\\\\\\n          ),\\\\\\\\n          order: 2,\\\\\\\\n        ),\\\\\\\\n        TutorialStep(\\\\\\\\n          id: 'step3',\\\\\\\\n          title: 'Add Blush - Right Cheek',\\\\\\\\n          instruction: 'Apply the same technique to your right cheek for a balanced look.',\\\\\\\\n          targetRegion: TargetRegion.rightCheek,\\\\\\\\n          overlayStyle: OverlayStyle(\\\\\\\\n            color: Color(0xFFFFB6C1),\\\\\\\\n            opacity: 0.3,\\\\\\\\n          ),\\\\\\\\n          order: 3,\\\\\\\\n        ),\\\\\\\\n      ],\\\\\\\\n      recommendationReasons: [\\\\\\\\n        'Perfect for everyday wear',\\\\\\\\n        'Enhances your natural features',\\\\\\\\n        'Quick and easy application',\\\\\\\\n      ],\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_point.dart';\\\\\\\\nimport 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_feature_result.dart';\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nclass FaceMeshService {\\\\\\\\n  final FaceDetector _detector;\\\\\\\\n  bool _isProcessing = false;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  FaceMeshService()\\\\\\\\n      : _detector = FaceDetector(\\\\\\\\n          options: FaceDetectorOptions(\\\\\\\\n            enableContours: true,\\\\\\\\n            enableLandmarks: true,\\\\\\\\n            enableClassification: true,\\\\\\\\n            enableTracking: true,\\\\\\\\n          ),\\\\\\\\n        );\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  Future\u003cList\u003cFacePoint\u003e?\u003e detectFace(InputImage image) async {\\\\\\\\n    if (_isProcessing) return null;\\\\\\\\n    _isProcessing = true;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    try {\\\\\\\\n      final faces = await _detector.processImage(image);\\\\\\\\n      if (faces.isEmpty) return null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // Get the first face (most prominent)\\\\\\\\n      final face = faces.first;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // Extract landmarks\\\\\\\\n      final landmarks = \u003cFacePoint\u003e[];\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // Face contour\\\\\\\\n      final faceContour = face.contours[FaceContourType.face];\\\\\\\\n      if (faceContour != null) {\\\\\\\\n        for (final point in faceContour.points) {\\\\\\\\n          landmarks.add(FacePoint(\\\\\\\\n            x: point.x.toDouble(),\\\\\\\\n            y: point.y.toDouble(),\\\\\\\\n          ));\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      // Lip contour\\\\\\\\n      final upperLipTop = face.contours[FaceContourType.upperLipTop];\\\\\\\\n      final lowerLipBottom = face.contours[FaceContourType.lowerLipBottom];\\\\\\\\n      if (upperLipTop != null \u0026\u0026 lowerLipBottom != null) {\\\\\\\\n        for (final point in upperLipTop.points) {\\\\\\\\n          landmarks.add(FacePoint(x: point.x.toDouble(), y: point.y.toDouble()));\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n        for (final point in lowerLipBottom.points) {\\\\\\\\n          landmarks.add(FacePoint(x: point.x.toDouble(), y: point.y.toDouble()));\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\n      }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n      return landmarks;\\\\\\\\n    } catch (e) {\\\\\\\\n      debugPrint('Face detection error: $e');\\\\\\\\n      return null;\\\\\\\\n    } finally {\\\\\\\\n      _isProcessing = false;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  FaceFeatureResult? analyzeFeatures(List\u003cFacePoint\u003e landmarks) {\\\\\\\\n    if (landmarks.isEmpty) return null;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // MVP: Simple rule-based feature analysis\\\\\\\\n    // In a real implementation, this would use proper geometric calculations\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Calculate face dimensions\\\\\\\\n    double minX = double.infinity, maxX = double.negativeInfinity;\\\\\\\\n    double minY = double.infinity, maxY = double.negativeInfinity;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    for (final point in landmarks) {\\\\\\\\n      if (point.x \u003c minX) minX = point.x;\\\\\\\\n      if (point.x \u003e maxX) maxX = point.x;\\\\\\\\n      if (point.y \u003c minY) minY = point.y;\\\\\\\\n      if (point.y \u003e maxY) maxY = point.y;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    final width = maxX - minX;\\\\\\\\n    final height = maxY - minY;\\\\\\\\n    final aspectRatio = height / width;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    // Determine face shape based on aspect ratio\\\\\\\\n    FaceShape faceShape;\\\\\\\\n    if (aspectRatio \u003e 1.4) {\\\\\\\\n      faceShape = FaceShape.long;\\\\\\\\n    } else if (aspectRatio \u003c 1.2) {\\\\\\\\n      faceShape = FaceShape.round;\\\\\\\\n    } else {\\\\\\\\n      faceShape = FaceShape.oval;\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n    return FaceFeatureResult(\\\\\\\\n      faceShape: faceShape,\\\\\\\\n      skinTone: SkinTone.unknown, // Would need color analysis\\\\\\\\n      lipType: LipType.medium, // Would need lip measurement\\\\\\\\n      confidenceLevel: ConfidenceLevel.medium,\\\\\\\\n      ratios: {'aspectRatio': aspectRatio},\\\\\\\\n    );\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n  void dispose() {\\\\\\\\n    _detector.close();\\\\\\\\n Meet Beauty - AI Makeup Coaching App\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nAn AI-powered makeup learning application that provides personalized tutorials with real-time AR guidance.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Features\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Face Analysis**: AI-powered facial feature detection and analysis\\\\\\\\n- **Personalized Recommendations**: Custom makeup tutorials based on your face shape, skin tone, and lip type\\\\\\\\n- **AR Tutorial Overlay**: Real-time visual guidance for makeup application\\\\\\\\n- **Progress Scoring**: Instant feedback on your makeup application\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Tech Stack\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Flutter** - Cross-platform mobile development\\\\\\\\n- **Google ML Kit** - Face detection and landmarks\\\\\\\\n- **Provider** - State management\\\\\\\\n- **go_router** - Navigation\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Project Structure\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\nlib/\\\\\\\\n  app/                    # App-level configuration\\\\\\\\n    theme/                # Theme and colors\\\\\\\\n    app.dart              # Root app widget\\\\\\\\n    router.dart           # Navigation routes\\\\\\\\n  core/                   # Core utilities\\\\\\\\n    constants/\\\\\\\\n    utils/\\\\\\\\n    logger/\\\\\\\\n  features/               # Feature-based modules\\\\\\\\n    home/                 # Home page\\\\\\\\n    analysis/             # Face analysis feature\\\\\\\\n    recommendation/       # Makeup recommendations\\\\\\\\n    tutorial/             # AR tutorial feature\\\\\\\\n    result/               # Scoring and results\\\\\\\\n  services/               # Infrastructure services\\\\\\\\n    camera/               # Camera management\\\\\\\\n    facemesh/             # Face detection\\\\\\\\n    overlay/              # AR overlay rendering\\\\\\\\n  shared/                 # Shared components\\\\\\\\n    models/               # Data models\\\\\\\\n    widgets/              # Reusable widgets\\\\\\\\n    config/               # App configuration\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Getting Started\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Prerequisites\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- Flutter SDK 3.11+\\\\\\\\n- Xcode (for iOS development)\\\\\\\\n- Android Studio (for Android development)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Installation\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. AI Makeup Coaching App\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nAn AI-powered makeup learning application that provides personalized tutorials with real-time AR guidance.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Features\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Face Analysis**: AI-powered facial feature detection and analysis\\\\\\\\n- **Personalized Recommendations**: Custom makeup tutorials based on your face shape, skin tone, and lip type\\\\\\\\n- **AR Tutorial Overlay**: Real-time visual guidance for makeup application\\\\\\\\n- **Progress Scoring**: Instant feedback on your makeup application\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Tech Stack\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Flutter** - Cross-platform mobile development\\\\\\\\n- **Google ML Kit** - Face detection and landmarks\\\\\\\\n- **Provider** - State management\\\\\\\\n- **go_router** - Navigation\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Project Structure\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\nlib/\\\\\\\\n  app/                    # App-level configuration\\\\\\\\n    theme/                # Theme and colors\\\\\\\\n    app.dart              # Root app widget\\\\\\\\n    router.dart           # Navigation routes\\\\\\\\n  core/                   # Core utilities\\\\\\\\n    constants/\\\\\\\\n    utils/\\\\\\\\n    logger/\\\\\\\\n  features/               # Feature-based modules\\\\\\\\n    home/                 # Home page\\\\\\\\n    analysis/             # Face analysis feature\\\\\\\\n    recommendation/       # Makeup recommendations\\\\\\\\n    tutorial/             # AR tutorial feature\\\\\\\\n    result/               # Scoring and results\\\\\\\\n  services/               # Infrastructure services\\\\\\\\n    camera/               # Camera management\\\\\\\\n    facemesh/             # Face detection\\\\\\\\n    overlay/              # AR overlay rendering\\\\\\\\n  shared/                 # Shared components\\\\\\\\n    models/               # Data models\\\\\\\\n    widgets/              # Reusable widgets\\\\\\\\n    config/               # App configuration\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## Getting Started\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Prerequisites\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- Flutter SDK 3.11+\\\\\\\\n- Xcode (for iOS development)\\\\\\\\n- Android Studio (for Android development)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Installation\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. &#96;node_modules&#96;、&#96;.git&#96;）\\\\n\\\\n仓库约 **110 个文件**，核心是 **Flutter 应用** + 各平台工程 + 若干产品文档。\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\nrhb/\\\\n├── lib/                    # Dart 业务与 UI（主代码）\\\\n├── android/                # Android 工程\\\\n├── ios/                    # iOS 工程\\\\n├── macos/                  # macOS 工程\\\\n├── web/                    # Web（index.html, manifest.json）\\\\n├── test/                   # widget_test.dart\\\\n├── assets/                 # pubspec 中声明，当前工作树内未见实际资源文件\\\\n├── pubspec.yaml / pubspec.lock\\\\n├── analysis_options.yaml\\\\n├── .env.example\\\\n├── .vscode/\\\\n├── .specstory/\\\\n├── README.md\\\\n├── PRD-AI化妆教学APP.md\\\\n├── 技术方案-MVP-AI化妆教学APP.md\\\\n├── 开发任务清单-AI化妆教学APP.md\\\\n├── User-Story-AI化妆教学APP.md\\\\n└── ChatGPT-AI 化妆教学 APP.md\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n&#96;README.md&#96; 里写的 &#96;lib/core/&#96;、&#96;shared/widgets/&#96; 等**在当前仓库里不存在**，以实际 &#96;lib/&#96; 为准。\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 2. 技术栈（来自 &#96;pubspec.yaml&#96; 等）\\\\n\\\\n| 类别 | 技术 |\\\\n|------|------|\\\\n| 框架 | **Flutter**（Dart SDK &#96;^3.10.0&#96;） |\\\\n| 状态管理 | **provider** |\\\\n| 路由 | **go_router** |\\\\n| 相机 | **camera** |\\\\n| 权限 | **permission_handler** |\\\\n| 人脸 | **google_mlkit_face_detection** |\\\\n| 图像 | **image** |\\\\n| UI | **cupertino_icons**, **flutter_svg** |\\\\n| 规范 | **flutter_lints** |\\\\n\\\\n声明的资源目录：&#96;assets/images/&#96;、&#96;assets/makeup_styles/&#96;、&#96;assets/tutorial_data/&#96;（当前 glob 未扫到文件，可能未提交或为空）。\\\\n\\\\n**没有**：&#96;package.json&#96;、后端框架、Prisma/SQLite 等数据库配置。\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 3. 页面 / 路由（无 HTTP API）\\\\n\\\\n使用 **&#96;go_router&#96;**，路由在 &#96;lib/app/router.dart&#96;：\\\\n\\\\n| 路径 | 名称 | 页面 |\\\\n|------|------|------|\\\\n| &#96;/&#96; | home | &#96;HomePage&#96; |\\\\n| &#96;/analysis&#96; | analysis | &#96;AnalysisPage&#96; |\\\\n| &#96;/tutorial&#96; | tutorial | &#96;TutorialPage&#96; |\\\\n| &#96;/result&#96; | result | &#96;ResultPage&#96; |\\\\n\\\\n**没有** 已实现的 REST/GraphQL 路由或 &#96;api/&#96; 目录；&#96;.env.example&#96; 仅预留未来 API/分析/云同步占位。\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 4. 数据库 schema / 表\\\\n\\\\n**仓库内没有数据库 schema**（无 &#96;SkinTone&#96;, &#96;LipType&#96;, &#96;ConfidenceLevel&#96;\\\\n- &#96;MakeupProfile&#96;, &#96;TutorialStep&#96;, &#96;TargetRegion&#96;, &#96;OverlayStyle&#96;\\\\n- &#96;ScoreResult&#96;\\\\n- &#96;FacePoint&#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 5. 各功能模块实现程度（概览）\\\\n\\\\n| 模块 | UI/流程 | 业务逻辑 | 与 ML/相机集成 |\\\\n|------|---------|----------|----------------|\\\\n| 首页 | 基本完成 | 仅导航 | 无 |\\\\n| 面部分析 | 有页面与状态机 | **模拟**：延时 + 固定 &#96;FaceFeatureResult&#96; | &#96;CameraService&#96; / &#96;FaceMeshService&#96; **未接入** |\\\\n| 推荐 | Controller 有规则 | **&#96;generateRecommendations&#96; 未被任何页面调用** | 无 |\\\\n| 教程 | 步骤、进度、简易 CustomPaint | 默认 &#96;MakeupProfile&#96; 内嵌步骤 | 真实相机与 landmarks **未接入**；&#96;OverlayRenderer&#96; **未使用** |\\\\n| 评分 | 有结果页 UI | &#96;ScoringController.calculateScore&#96; **已实现但全项目无调用** → 结果页会一直 &#96;CircularProgressIndicator&#96; | 无 |\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 6. &#96;lib/&#96; 下文件与职责（业务代码清单）\\\\n\\\\n### 入口与应用壳\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;lib/main.dart&#96;**：&#96;WidgetsFlutterBinding.ensureInitialized()&#96;，&#96;runApp(MeetBeautyApp())&#96;。\\\\n- **&#96;lib/app/app.dart&#96;**：&#96;MultiProvider&#96; + &#96;MaterialApp.router&#96;，主题与 &#96;appRouter&#96;。\\\\n- **&#96;lib/app/router.dart&#96;**：上述 4 条路由。\\\\n- **&#96;lib/shared/config/app_config.dart&#96;**：应用名、版本、动画/相机/检测参数常量；注册 4 个 &#96;ChangeNotifierProvider&#96;。\\\\n- **&#96;lib/app/theme/app_theme.dart&#96;**：Material 3 亮/暗主题。\\\\n- **&#96;lib/app/theme/app_colors.dart&#96;**：品牌色与文本色等常量。\\\\n\\\\n### Feature：首页\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;lib/features/home/presentation/home_page.dart&#96;**：欢迎页、卖点列表、&#96;Start Learning&#96; → &#96;/analysis&#96;；“Choose a Tutorial Style” 为 **TODO**。\\\\n\\\\n### Feature：面部分析\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;lib/features/analysis/presentation/analysis_page.dart&#96;**：&#96;initState&#96; 里调用 &#96;startAnalysis()&#96;；相机区多为占位（图标/灰底）；展示 &#96;FaceFeatureResult&#96; 徽章；“Start Tutorial” 在完成分析后可用。\\\\n- **&#96;lib/features/analysis/application/analysis_controller.dart&#96;**：**无真实相机/ML**；&#96;Future.delayed&#96; 后写入写死的 &#96;FaceFeatureResult(oval, warm, medium, high)&#96;。\\\\n\\\\n### Feature：教程\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;lib/features/tutorial/presentation/tutorial_page.dart&#96;**：全屏“相机”占位、&#96;_OverlayPainter&#96; 按 &#96;TargetRegion&#96; 画简单椭圆；上一步/下一步/完成 → &#96;/result&#96;；AR 与 landmarks 为 **TODO**。\\\\n- **&#96;lib/features/tutorial/application/tutorial_controller.dart&#96;**：步骤状态机、默认 &#96;natural_daily&#96; 三步教程、&#96;pause&#96;/&#96;resume&#96;/&#96;skip&#96; 等。\\\\n\\\\n### Feature：结果\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;lib/features/result/presentation/result_page.dart&#96;**：&#96;Consumer\u003cScoringController\u003e&#96; 若 &#96;scoreResult == null&#96; 则一直转圈；&#96;Consumer\u003cTutorialController\u003e&#96; 显示步数与时间；按钮回首页/再练。\\\\n- **&#96;lib/features/result/application/scoring_controller.dart&#96;**：按完成率、跳过步数算分、星级与文案；需外部传入 &#96;TutorialController&#96; 调用 &#96;calculateScore&#96;（**当前无调用点**）。\\\\n\\\\n### Feature：推荐（仅逻辑层）\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;lib/features/recommendation/application/recommendation_controller.dart&#96;**：根据 &#96;FaceFeatureResult&#96; 规则生成 &#96;MakeupProfile&#96; 列表（圆脸加 contour 模板 + 始终包含 natural_daily）；**无对应 UI**。\\\\n\\\\n### Services（已实现类，未接线）\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;lib/services/camera/camera_service.dart&#96;**：前置相机初始化、&#96;startImageStream&#96; / &#96;stopImageStream&#96;。\\\\n- **&#96;lib/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart&#96;**：ML Kit &#96;FaceDetector&#96;，从轮廓提取 &#96;FacePoint&#96;，&#96;analyzeFeatures&#96; 用宽高比粗分脸型（肤色/唇型仍为占位）。\\\\n- **&#96;lib/services/overlay/overlay_renderer.dart&#96;**：基于画布的几何叠加（与 &#96;FacePoint&#96; 的高级方法多为占位 &#96;null&#96;）。\\\\n\\\\n### Shared models\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;lib/shared/models/face_feature_result.dart&#96;**：特征枚举与结果模型。\\\\n- **&#96;lib/shared/models/makeup_profile.dart&#96;**：教程步骤、妆造配置。\\\\n- **&#96;lib/shared/models/face_point.dart&#96;**： landmark 点。\\\\n- **&#96;lib/shared/models/score_result.dart&#96;**：评分结果。\\\\n- **&#96;lib/shared/models/models.dart&#96;**：barrel export。\\\\n\\\\n### 测试\\\\n\\\\n- **&#96;test/widget_test.dart&#96;**：挂载 &#96;MeetBeautyApp&#96;，断言出现 “Meet Beauty”。\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 小结\\\\n\\\\n- 项目是 **Flutter MVP**：导航与页面骨架、教程状态机、评分算法草稿、ML Kit/相机服务类都已写，但 ## 当前项目实现情况分析

这是一个 **Flutter MVP 项目**（AI 化妆教学 APP），目前处于**早期骨架搭建阶段**，页面和导航已就绪，但核心技术链路尚未打通。下面按模块逐一分析：

---

### 已完成的基础设施

| 模块 | 状态 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| Flutter 工程初始化 | ✅ 完成 | Dart SDK `^3.10.0`，多平台工程（Android/iOS/macOS/Web） |
| 路由系统 | ✅ 完成 | `go_router`，4 条路由：`/` → `/analysis` → `/tutorial` → `/result` |
| 状态管理 | ✅ 完成 | `provider` + `MultiProvider`，注册了 4 个 Controller |
| 主题 & 样式 | ✅ 完成 | Material 3 亮/暗主题、品牌色常量 |
| 数据模型 | ✅ 完成 | `FaceFeatureResult`、`MakeupProfile`、`TutorialStep`、`ScoreResult`、`FacePoint` 等 |
| 配置常量 | ✅ 完成 | 动画参数、相机参数、检测参数等 |

---

### 各功能页面实现情况

#### 1. 首页 (`HomePage`) — Phase 0 ✅ 骨架完成
- 欢迎语 + 卖点列表 + "开始学习" 按钮
- 跳转到 `/analysis` 页
- **未完成**：妆容模板选择（标记为 TODO）

#### 2. 面部分析页 (`AnalysisPage`) — Phase 2 ⚠️ 仅 UI 壳 + 模拟数据
- 页面布局和状态机（loading → 完成 → 失败）已实现
- 分析结果展示（脸型/肤色/唇型标签徽章）已实现
- **关键缺失**：`AnalysisController` 使用 `Future.delayed` + **硬编码固定结果**（oval/warm/medium），未接入真实相机和 ML Kit

#### 3. 推荐模块 (`RecommendationController`) — Phase 2 ⚠️ 仅逻辑层，无 UI
- 规则引擎已写：根据 `FaceFeatureResult` 生成 `MakeupProfile` 列表
- **关键缺失**：没有对应的推荐结果页面，`generateRecommendations` **全项目无调用点**

#### 4. 教程页 (`TutorialPage`) — Phase 3 ⚠️ 骨架 + 占位绘制
- 步骤状态机完成：未开始 → 进行中 → 完成
- 上一步 / 下一步 / 完成教学交互已实现
- `_OverlayPainter` 按 `TargetRegion` 画简单椭圆占位
- 默认内嵌 `natural_daily` 三步教程数据
- **关键缺失**：相机预览为占位灰底，AR 渲染未接入 landmarks，`OverlayRenderer` 未使用

#### 5. 结果页 (`ResultPage`) — Phase 4 ⚠️ UI 存在但逻辑未接通
- 页面布局已实现：分数展示、反馈文案、"再练一次" / "回首页" 按钮
- `ScoringController.calculateScore` 算法已写（完成率/跳过步数 → 分数/星级/文案）
- **关键缺失**：`calculateScore` **全项目无调用点**，导致结果页会一直显示 loading 转圈

---

### 服务层实现情况

| 服务 | 代码状态 | 是否接入 |
|------|----------|----------|
| `CameraService` | ✅ 已实现（前置相机初始化、帧流控制） | ❌ 未被任何页面使用 |
| `FaceMeshService` | ✅ 已实现（ML Kit FaceDetector、轮廓提取、脸型粗分） | ❌ 未被任何页面使用 |
| `OverlayRenderer` | ⚠️ 部分实现（基础几何叠加，高级方法为占位） | ❌ 未被任何页面使用 |

---

### 按开发阶段总结

| 阶段 | 目标 | 完成度 |
|------|------|--------|
| **Phase 0** 产品定义 & 技术预研 | 工程初始化、技术选型 | **~70%** — 工程和依赖就绪，但预研验证（相机+FaceMesh+叠色效果联调）未跑通 |
| **Phase 1** 核心视觉链路 | 相机 → 关键点 → AR 渲染 | **~20%** — 服务类已写但未接线，页面是占位 |
| **Phase 2** 分析推荐流程 | 拍脸分析 → 推荐 → 进教学 | **~25%** — 分析页用模拟数据，推荐逻辑写了但没页面 |
| **Phase 3** 分步教学流程 | 教学步骤控制器 | **~40%** — 步骤状态机和交互完成，但缺真实 AR 渲染 |
| **Phase 4** 反馈与评分 | 结果页 + 评分 | **~30%** — 评分算法和 UI 都有，但未接通 |
| **Phase 5** 稳定性 & 上线 | 埋点/性能/测试 | **~0%** — 尚未开始 |

---

### 核心结论

项目当前的状态是：**"四个页面的导航流程能跑通，但核心技术链路全部断开"**。具体来说：

1. **最大的断点**：`CameraService` 和 `FaceMeshService` 已经写好了，但没有接入任何页面。分析页用的是假数据，教程页的相机是灰底占位。
2. **推荐流程缺页面**：推荐规则引擎写了，但用户看不到推荐结果（没有 UI）。
3. **结果页死循环**：`ScoringController.calculateScore` 没有被调用，结果页永远 loading。
4. **资源目录为空**：`assets/images/`、`assets/makeup_styles/`、`assets/tutorial_data/` 声明了但无实际文件。

**下一步建议优先级**：先把 Phase 1（相机 + FaceMesh + AR 渲染）打通，这是整个产品的技术基座，后续所有功能都依赖它。

---

_**User**_

好，先把Phase 1（相机 + FaceMesh + AR 渲染）打通
制定方案吧

_**Agent (claude-4.6-sonnet-medium-thinking)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now I have a thorough understanding of the codebase. Let me create a comprehensive plan for Phase 1.

The key things that need to happen for Phase 1:

1. **CameraService needs to be connected to TutorialPage** - Show real camera preview instead of the placeholder black container with icon.

2. **FaceMeshService needs to be connected** - Process camera frames to detect face landmarks in real-time.

3. **OverlayRenderer needs to use real landmarks** - Instead of drawing at fixed screen center positions, the overlay should follow actual face landmarks.

4. **Coordinate transformation** - Camera image coordinates to screen coordinates conversion is needed (this is a critical piece).


5. **Performance optimization** - I need to throttle frame processing so face detection doesn't run on every single frame.

6. **Lifecycle management** - The camera should pause and resume properly when the app moves between foreground and background states.

The architecture shift is straightforward: instead of TutorialPage displaying a static placeholder with a fixed overlay, I need to wire up the real camera preview, feed those frames through FaceMeshService for landmark detection, and have OverlayRenderer respond to the actual landmark positions. The main technical hurdles are converting camera image data into a format ML Kit can process, transforming coordinates from the camera's image space to the screen's display space, managing the landmark data flow through state, and handling frame throttling efficiently.

I'm leaning toward creating a dedicated `CameraFaceTrackingController` that sits between the camera and face mesh services—it'll handle the orchestration, expose landmarks as a stream, and manage all the coordinate transformations and throttling. This keeps concerns separated and lets TutorialPage stay focused on step progression while pulling camera and landmark data from this new controller.

For the implementation, I need to handle the conversion from camera frames to the format the face mesh service expects, extract and organize the landmarks into meaningful groups like lip contours and face outlines, then update the overlay renderer to actually draw based on those landmarks instead of placeholders. I'll also need to think through how the camera image coordinates map to the preview widget's display space, accounting for rotation and resolution differences.

Defining the landmark structure... I'm mapping out the specific contour types that ML Kit provides for facial features—the face outline gives me 36 points, and I have dedicated contours for the lips (upper and lower, both outer and inner edges) that I can combine into closed polygons for the overlay. For the cheeks, I'll need to derive them from the overall face contour combined with the nose and eye positions.

I'm also considering whether the user will be testing on a physical device, since that affects how I handle camera input and image conversion across platforms. Let me sketch out what a ChangeNotifier-based controller would look like to manage the face tracking state...

Building the controller class...

Now I'm weighing whether to make this a provider or keep it as local state in the tutorial page, since it could potentially be reused elsewhere.

I think the right call is to create `FaceTrackingController` as a ChangeNotifier and register it as a provider at the app level, but explicitly start and stop tracking from the pages that need it—that way the camera isn't running unnecessarily when we're elsewhere in the app.

There's also the coordinate transformation challenge to solve: the camera gives us raw image data, ML Kit processes it and returns face landmarks in image coordinates, but we need to map those back to screen coordinates. The transformation depends on the image dimensions, rotation, and preview size, so I need to handle that conversion carefully.

Now I'm thinking through the overall structure—I should check if there's already a structured model for face landmarks or if I need to create one that organizes the data properly.

Looking at what needs to happen, I'm breaking this into four main tasks. First, I'll create a structured FaceLandmarks model that groups face contours, lip regions, and cheek areas instead of returning a flat list. Then I need to upgrade the FaceMeshService to handle camera image conversion, return the structured data, extract all lip contour types, calculate cheek centers, and include transformation metadata. Next comes a FaceTrackingController that acts as a ChangeNotifier to coordinate the camera and mesh services, handle frame throttling based on the app config, transform coordinates from image space to widget space, manage detection state, and handle the lifecycle. Finally, I'll upgrade the OverlayRenderer to work with this new structure.

Now I'm implementing the rendering logic for the lip polygons and cheek overlays using the computed landmarks, adding point smoothing with exponential moving average, and applying the step's overlay styles for colors. Then I'll integrate everything into the TutorialPage by replacing the placeholder with a real camera preview, wiring up the controller, passing landmarks to the painter, handling app lifecycle changes, and showing detection status. Finally, I need to register the FaceTrackingController in the providers, add the camera permission request flow, and handle the denied state.</details></think>

```json
{
  "name": "Phase1 相机AR链路打通",
  "overview": "将已有的 CameraService、FaceMeshService、OverlayRenderer 三个服务接入 TutorialPage，实现\"实时相机预览 -\u003e 人脸关键点检测 -\u003e 基于 landmarks 的 AR overlay 渲染\"完整链路。",
  "plan": "# Phase 1: 相机 + FaceMesh + AR 渲染链路打通\n\n## 当前状态\n\n三个核心服务已有基础代码但 **全部未接入任何页面**：\n\n- [CameraService](lib/services/camera/camera_service.dart) — 前置相机初始化、帧流控制，但无页面使用\n- [FaceMeshService](lib/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart) — ML Kit FaceDetector，返回扁平 &#96;List\u003cFacePoint\u003e&#96;，但无页面调用\n- [OverlayRenderer](lib/services/overlay/overlay_renderer.dart) — 画固定位置椭圆，未使用真实 landmarks\n- [TutorialPage](lib/features/tutorial/presentation/tutorial_page.dart) — 相机区域是黑底占位图标，overlay 画在屏幕中心固定位置\n\n## 目标数据流\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;mermaid\nflowchart LR\n  Camera[\"CameraService\\n实时帧流\"] --\u003e|CameraImage| Convert[\"InputImage\\n格式转换\"]\n  Convert --\u003e|InputImage| FaceMesh[\"FaceMeshService\\n人脸检测\"]\n  FaceMesh --\u003e|FaceLandmarks| Controller[\"FaceTrackingController\\n坐标变换+节流+平滑\"]\n  Controller --\u003e|landmarks| Renderer[\"OverlayPainter\\n唇部/脸颊 AR 渲染\"]\n  Camera --\u003e|CameraPreview| UI[\"TutorialPage\\n实时预览 + overlay 叠加\"]\n  Controller --\u003e|状态| UI\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## 具体任务\n\n### 1. 新建 FaceLandmarks 结构化模型\n\n**文件**: &#96;lib/shared/models/face_landmarks.dart&#96;\n\n当前 &#96;FaceMeshService.detectFace&#96; 返回扁平 &#96;List\u003cFacePoint\u003e&#96;，脸部轮廓和唇部点混在一起，无法区分用于不同区域渲染。需要创建结构化模型：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;dart\nclass FaceLandmarks {\n  final List\u003cFacePoint\u003e faceContour;       // 36 点，脸部轮廓\n  final List\u003cFacePoint\u003e upperLipTop;       // 11 点，上唇外轮廓\n  final List\u003cFacePoint\u003e upperLipBottom;    // 9 点，上唇内轮廓\n  final List\u003cFacePoint\u003e lowerLipTop;       // 9 点，下唇内轮廓\n  final List\u003cFacePoint\u003e lowerLipBottom;    // 9 点，下唇外轮廓\n  final FacePoint? noseBase;               // 鼻基部，用于计算脸颊\n  final FacePoint? leftEye;                // 左眼中心\n  final FacePoint? rightEye;               // 右眼中心\n  final Rect boundingBox;                  // 人脸边界框\n  final double? headAngleY;                // 头部偏转角度（侧脸检测）\n  final double? headAngleZ;                // 头部倾斜角度\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 2. 升级 FaceMeshService\n\n**文件**: [lib/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart](lib/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart)\n\n改动要点：\n- 新增 &#96;CameraImage&#96; -\u003e &#96;InputImage&#96; 转换方法（**关键技术难点**）\n  - Android: NV21 格式，用 &#96;InputImage.fromBytes()&#96; + &#96;InputImageMetadata&#96;\n  - iOS: bgra8888 格式，同上但不同 &#96;InputImageFormat&#96;\n  - 需要处理设备旋转方向 (&#96;InputImageRotation&#96;)\n- 修改 &#96;detectFace&#96; 返回 &#96;FaceLandmarks?&#96; 而非 &#96;List\u003cFacePoint\u003e?&#96;\n- 提取 ML Kit 的全部 4 组唇部轮廓 (&#96;upperLipTop&#96;, &#96;upperLipBottom&#96;, &#96;lowerLipTop&#96;, &#96;lowerLipBottom&#96;)\n- 提取 landmarks (&#96;noseBase&#96;, &#96;leftEye&#96;, &#96;rightEye&#96;)\n- 提取 &#96;headEulerAngleY/Z&#96; 用于侧脸判断\n\n核心转换代码参考：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;dart\nInputImage? convertCameraImage(CameraImage image, CameraDescription camera) {\n  final rotation = _getRotation(camera.sensorOrientation);\n  final format = Platform.isAndroid \n      ? InputImageFormat.nv21 \n      : InputImageFormat.bgra8888;\n  final plane = image.planes.first;\n  return InputImage.fromBytes(\n    bytes: plane.bytes,\n    metadata: InputImageMetadata(\n      size: Size(image.width.toDouble(), image.height.toDouble()),\n      rotation: rotation,\n      format: format,\n      bytesPerRow: plane.bytesPerRow,\n    ),\n  );\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 3. 新建 FaceTrackingController\n\n**文件**: &#96;lib/services/face_tracking_controller.dart&#96;\n\n这是整个链路的**核心编排器**，作为 &#96;ChangeNotifier&#96; 注册到 Provider 树：\n\n- 持有 &#96;CameraService&#96; 和 &#96;FaceMeshService&#96; 实例\n- **帧节流**: 每 200ms 处理一帧（按 &#96;AppConfig.analysisIntervalMs&#96;），避免每帧都跑 ML Kit\n- **坐标变换**: 将 ML Kit 返回的图像坐标转换为 Flutter widget 坐标\n  - 考虑图像旋转（竖屏拍摄时图像实际是横向的）\n  - 前置相机镜像翻转\n  - 图像尺寸到预览 widget 尺寸的缩放\n- **点位平滑**: 对 landmarks 做指数移动平均（EMA），降低抖动\n- **状态管理**: &#96;isTracking&#96;, &#96;isFaceDetected&#96;, &#96;landmarks&#96;, &#96;errorMessage&#96;\n- **生命周期**: &#96;startTracking()&#96; / &#96;stopTracking()&#96; / &#96;pauseTracking()&#96; / &#96;resumeTracking()&#96;\n\n关键 API：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;dart\nclass FaceTrackingController extends ChangeNotifier {\n  FaceLandmarks? get landmarks;\n  bool get isFaceDetected;\n  bool get isTracking;\n  CameraController? get cameraController;  // 给 CameraPreview 用\n  \n  Future\u003cvoid\u003e startTracking();\n  void stopTracking();\n  void updatePreviewSize(Size size);        // overlay 坐标变换用\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n坐标变换核心逻辑：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;dart\nOffset imageToWidgetCoord(FacePoint p, Size imageSize, Size widgetSize, \n    InputImageRotation rotation, bool isFrontCamera) {\n  double x = p.x, y = p.y;\n  // 1. 根据 rotation 旋转坐标\n  // 2. 缩放到 widget 尺寸\n  // 3. 前置相机水平镜像\n  return Offset(transformedX, transformedY);\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 4. 升级 OverlayRenderer — 真实 landmarks 渲染\n\n**文件**: [lib/services/overlay/overlay_renderer.dart](lib/services/overlay/overlay_renderer.dart)\n\n改动要点：\n- **唇部渲染**: 用 &#96;upperLipTop&#96; + &#96;lowerLipBottom&#96;（外轮廓）构建闭合 Path，填充颜色\n- **脸颊渲染**: 根据 &#96;noseBase&#96; + &#96;leftEye&#96;/&#96;rightEye&#96; + &#96;faceContour&#96; 计算脸颊中心，画高斯模糊椭圆\n- 保留 fallback: 当 landmarks 不足时降级为当前的固定位置椭圆\n- 使用 &#96;MaskFilter.blur&#96; 实现腮红边缘柔化\n\n唇部 Path 构建示意：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;dart\nPath buildLipPath(List\u003cFacePoint\u003e upperLipTop, List\u003cFacePoint\u003e lowerLipBottom) {\n  final path = Path();\n  // upperLipTop 从左到右\n  path.moveTo(upperLipTop.first.x, upperLipTop.first.y);\n  for (final p in upperLipTop.skip(1)) { path.lineTo(p.x, p.y); }\n  // lowerLipBottom 从右到左（反向遍历）闭合\n  for (final p in lowerLipBottom.reversed) { path.lineTo(p.x, p.y); }\n  path.close();\n  return path;\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 5. 改造 TutorialPage — 接入真实相机和 AR\n\n**文件**: [lib/features/tutorial/presentation/tutorial_page.dart](lib/features/tutorial/presentation/tutorial_page.dart)\n\n改动要点：\n- **替换占位容器为 &#96;CameraPreview&#96;**: 使用 &#96;FaceTrackingController.cameraController&#96; 显示实时画面\n- **OverlayPainter 接收真实 landmarks**: 从 &#96;FaceTrackingController.landmarks&#96; 获取，传给 &#96;OverlayRenderer.drawOverlay&#96;\n- **lifecycle 管理**: 实现 &#96;WidgetsBindingObserver&#96;，切后台暂停 camera，回前台恢复\n- **状态 UI**: 未检测到人脸时显示提示（\"请将面部对准屏幕\"）\n- **权限处理**: 首次进入时请求相机权限，拒绝时显示引导\n- **dispose**: 页面退出时调用 &#96;stopTracking()&#96; 释放资源\n\n页面结构变更：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nStack\n  ├── CameraPreview (实时画面)\n  ├── CustomPaint / OverlayPainter (AR overlay，基于真实 landmarks)\n  ├── 人脸状态提示 (未检测到时显示)\n  ├── 关闭按钮 + 进度指示\n  └── 步骤卡片 + 操作按钮\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### 6. Provider 注册 \u0026 权限处理\n\n**文件**: [lib/shared/config/app_config.dart](lib/shared/config/app_config.dart)\n\n- 将 &#96;FaceTrackingController&#96; 注册到 &#96;AppConfig.providers&#96;\n- 在 TutorialPage 的 &#96;initState&#96; 中使用 &#96;permission_handler&#96; 请求相机权限\n- 权限拒绝时显示说明页面，引导用户去设置中开启\n\n## 风险与注意事项\n\n- **CameraImage -\u003e InputImage 转换** 是最容易出错的环节，Android/iOS 格式不同，旋转方向不同，需要逐平台调试\n- **坐标变换** 前置相机的镜像 + 旋转组合容易搞反，建议先在 debug 模式下绘制原始 landmark 点验证\n- **性能**: ML Kit 人脸检测在中端机上约 15-30ms/帧，配合 200ms 节流足够流畅；但要确保 &#96;_isProcessing&#96; 锁防止并发\n- **ML Kit 版本兼容**: &#96;google_mlkit_face_detection: ^0.12.0&#96; 已在 pubspec.yaml 中声明，需确认其 contour API 与代码匹配\n\n## 验收标准\n\n- TutorialPage 显示真实前置相机画面\n- 面部移动时，唇部 overlay 能跟随嘴唇位置\n- 脸颊 overlay 能跟随双颊位置\n- 连续运行 3 分钟无崩溃\n- 切后台再回来相机能正常恢复\n- 无人脸时显示友好提示\n",
```
